svc.crashed: Background engine stopped unexpectedly — restarting ({{attempt}} of {{max}})
svc.gaveUp: Background engine could not be restarted after {{n}} attempts — please restart atelier
svc.spawnFailed: Background engine could not be started: {{error}}
svc.noToken: Background engine refused to start without a security token
svc.hostGone: atelier was closed — shutting the background engine down
svc.devNoAuth: Developer mode: the background engine runs without a security token
svc.rejected: A request was rejected because it lacked permission ({{path}})

appearance.textureFailed: {{slot}}: texture {{name}} could not be loaded ({{reason}}) — the item stays untextured
